texts.full_text: to main | skip to sidebar 29 March 2010 Man Up by Phil Johnson Series Guide (This post is part of a series, taken from the transcript of a message on 1 Corinthians 16:13 given at the 2010 Shepherds' Conference.) Intro: "The church militant?" 1. "Watch Out" 2. "Stand Firm" 3. "Man Up" 4. "Be Strong" "Act like men" (1 Corinthians 16:13) he expression literally means, "Be men," or "be manly." The TNIV, notorious for trying to sidestep masculine pronouns and male-oriented words, simply says, "Be courageous." That's an important aspect of what Paul is saying here. It's a start, but it's not really the full gist. Paul uses the Greek verb andrizomai in the middle voice. It's another one-word imperative, though it's hard to make it one word in English. It means "play the

texts.preview_tail: with the table_friends table, and filters the results to only include consumer_id from the table_friends table with the account_id = 12345. Make sure to adjust the account_id and table names to match
texts.full_text: table_consumers.account_id GROUP BY table_SELECT table_consumers.id, table_consumers.account_id, table_consumers.people_id FROM table_consumers JOIN table_friends ON table_consumers.account_id = table_friends.account_id GRoUP BY table_consumers.id, table_consumers.account_id, table_consumers.people_id HAVING table_friends.account_id = 12345 This query retrieves the consumer_id from the table_consumers table, joins it with the table_friends table, and filters the results to only include consumer_id from the table_friends table with the account_id = 12345. texts.preview_tail: 25 26 27 28 29 30 31 Categories Bears Change is Coming Change the World Dad Stuff Engineering Movements I Support Personal Finance Archives July 2018 December 2017 November 2017 October 2017 September
texts.full_text: eople in history have ever been brave and courageous enough to sustain the drive and motivation necessary to find the solution to a problem that fundamentally shifts the way we live as human beings. Can I now count on you to be that person? You can single handily have a monumentaul impact on the lives of millions of families. Was there ever a time you wanted to be a SUPERHERO? Well the time is now! We have less time than we think. Can we let go of our fears and if for nothing else, communicate our visions for a better America? A better world? As I mentioned earlier, I’ve developed a solution that I feel can do this and I would like to share it with you face to face. If you would like to work through and intermediary, that’s fine too. But, I would need assurances that if you like what you hear, you would be committed to seeing this endeavor through. Sorry to have to finish this letter like a Craig’s list ad but PLEASE..serious inquiries only! Sincerely, C. J.
